# Turtleand Hermes Lab

> Practical Hermes Agent field notes for voice workflows, messaging gateways, tools, skills, and operational reliability.

## Guides
- [Fix Telegram Voice Speed Control in Hermes with OGG Opus](https://hermes.turtleand.com/topics/telegram-ogg-voice-speed-control): Why Hermes Telegram TTS replies need OGG Opus voice files for waveform and playback speed controls, and how ffmpeg fixes MP3 fallback.

## About
Created by Turtleand — documenting real-world Hermes deployment and configuration.
- Portal: https://turtleand.com
- Hermes Agent docs: https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/turtleand
